name: Brant Legal Nurse Consultants, LLC
description: Provides medicolegal services including medical record review, chronology and timeline preparation, case opinions, trial preparation, and translation of medical terms for legal teams.[1]

sentiment.label: positive

highlights.text: honest, expert, cost-effective medical-legal consulting services
100% satisfaction guarantee—will revise work to meet your specifications

sentiment.summary: Reputable firm emphasizing expertise, affordability, and strong customer commitment through unconditional satisfaction guarantees and revision policies.

name: CLB Legal Nurse Consulting, LLC
description: Offers litigation support for medical malpractice, toxic tort, products liability, nursing home litigation, workplace injury, and personal injury/wrongful death cases.[3]

sentiment.label: positive

highlights.text: She is a talented nurse consultant and she tackles each project with vigor and thoroughness
Cindy is good to work with, she knows her stuff
I have found Cindy to be dependable, prompt, and knowledgeable

sentiment.summary: Glowing professional recommendation highlighting Cindy Burhoe's reliability, expertise, accessibility, and quality work as a nurse consultant.

name: Jennifer Orr Legal Nurse Consulting
description: Supports medical malpractice and personal injury attorneys with case review, expert witness sourcing, litigation facilitation, and nurse observer services during IME/DME.[8]

name: Ohio Legal Nurse Consulting
description: Provides medical record organization, case chronology, error spotting, medical simplification, and healthcare deposition guidance for attorneys and families.[7]

name: Trompak & Associates Legal Nurse Consulting
description: Delivers medical consultant services and testifying expert services for attorneys in medical-related litigation.[9]
